title: Master Claude Code with Claude Fable 5 (57 mins)
summary: A video tutorial on advanced use of Claude Code as a systematic coding platform rather than a chat interface. Covers desktop app, CLI, web, IDE mode, local/cloud/remote execution, permissions, slash commands, connectors, plugins, skills, routines, agents, hooks, and dynamic workflows across real project applications.
writeup: This Keith AI tutorial frames Claude Code as a systematic coding platform rather than a chat interface, walking through advanced use across roughly 57 minutes. It covers the desktop app, CLI, web, and IDE mode, along with local, cloud, and remote execution, and explains the controls that shape agentic workflows: permissions, slash commands, connectors, plugins, skills, routines, agents, and hooks. The throughline is building dynamic workflows applied to real project applications, with subagents and hooks used to structure automation.
